items.title: Backrooms is a certified blockbuster with a $38 million opening day
items.description: The Kane Parsons' film Backrooms is expected to earn up to $90 million in its opening weekend after pulling down $38 million on Friday alone. That's not only above expectations, but absolutely obliterates A24's previous opening weekend record of $25.5 million for Alex Garland's Civil War. It's also ...

items.title: Pebblebee’s Halo watches my back and my belongings
items.description: I live in a part of Los Angeles where I feel safer bringing pepper spray on walks. items.title: Sometimes, a short game hits the spot
items.description: Slots & Daggers, a low-key, fantasy-themed slot machine roguelike, was one of my favorite games last year. That may sound like a complicated description, but the game mixes ideas from deckbuilding roguelikes with slot machines to create an engrossing loop, and there's steady meta-progression that he...
